article.description: — Jalen Brunson had a game-high 28 points in his return from a two-game absence, Landry Shamet scored a pair of 3-pointers in the final 1:02 and drew a crucial charging foul in the final second, and the Knicks beat the Dallas Mavericks 113-111 on...
article.headline: Brunson's 28 points, Shamet's late heroics push Knicks past Mavericks 113-111

images.caption: Brandon Williams' offensive foul negates a Mavs go-ahead basket as the Knicks pick up their first road win of the season.
images.name: Knicks outlast Mavs in first road win of season

article.linkText: Brunson's 28 points, Shamet's late heroics push Knicks past Mavericks 113-111
article.story: DALLAS -- — Jalen Brunson had a game-high 28 points in his return from a two-game absence, Landry Shamet scored a pair of 3-pointers in the final 1:02 and drew a crucial charging foul in the final second, and the Knicks beat the Dallas Mavericks 113-111 on Wednesday night. Karl-Anthony Towns had 18 points and 14 rebounds while Josh Hart had 16 points and 10 rebounds off the bench for the Knicks, who won for the first time in five road games. Brunson, who had a grade 1 ankle sprain, hit a free throw with 3.8 seconds left for a two-point lead. Dallas’ P.J. Washington inbounded to Brandon Williams at midcourt, Williams drove to the basket and scored with 0.7 seconds left but was called for charging into Shamet. D’Angelo Russell and Naji Marshall scored 23 points each off the bench for the Mavericks, who have lost five of their last six games. Brunson’s free throw ended a string of five straight Knicks misses from the line in the final 22 seconds. They shot 19 for 35 (54.3%) on free throws overall. The Knicks were 12 for 42 from 3-point range after hitting 3 of 22 during the first half. The Mavericks, who were last in the NBA averaging 10.5 3-pointers per game, hit 13 through the first three quarters but were 3 for 11 in the fourth. Dallas tied a season high with 64 points from its bench to New York’s 39, but Mavericks starters scored only 47 points. The Mavericks’ Cooper Flagg, the top pick in this year’s draft, missed his first NBA game on Wednesday night with an illness. Up Next Knicks: At Orlando on Saturday. Mavericks: Host New Orleans on Friday night. ------ AP NBA: https://www.apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.caption: The Knicks are now heavy favorites to win the Eastern Conference after taking a 3-0 series lead over the Cavs.

images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.

videos.description: Landry Shamet gets the Knicks going with an and-1 after New York wins the jump ball.
videos.headline: Landry Shamet drops in early and-1 for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet drops in early and-1 for the Knicks) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Klay Thompson pulls up from downtown and sinks the 3-pointer for the Mavericks.
videos.headline: Klay Thompson gets 3-pointer to fall for Dallas

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Klay Thompson gets 3-pointer to fall for Dallas) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Josh Hart gets the ball in the corner and drains a 3-pointer for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Josh Hart cashes in from the corner for New York

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart cashes in from the corner for New York) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns flies to the rack and throws down a massive dunk over Daniel Gafford.
videos.headline: KAT throws it down over Gafford

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT throws it down over Gafford) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaden Hardy pulls up from the wing and knocks down the 3-pointer for the Mavericks.
videos.headline: Jaden Hardy drops in a 3 from the wing

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaden Hardy drops in a 3 from the wing) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Miles McBride gets to the bucket for a tough reverse layup for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miles McBride drops in reverse layup for New York) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Jordan Clarkson drives to the front of the rack and floats in an and-1 for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Clarkson floats in and-1 for the Knicks) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Daniel Gafford forces his way to the basket and drops in an and-1 for Dallas.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gafford muscles in and-1 for the Mavs) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Daniel Gafford gets the ball along the baseline and rattles in the and-1 for the Mavericks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gafford gets another and-1 to fall for Dallas) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson gets a friendly bounce on a short jumper while drawing contact for the Knicks.

videos.description: Jalen Brunson drains a tough and-1 in front of the basket late in the first half for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson leans in for a slick and-1 for New York) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandon has a wide-open look for a 3-pointer and drills it for the Mavericks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brandon Williams drains wide-open 3-pointer for Dallas) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart gets M&M's from fan after crashing into him) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns knocks down a 3-pointer from the wing in the third quarter.

videos.description: Jaden Hardy flies to the rack for a tough and-1 late in the third quarter for the Mavericks.

videos.description: The Knicks turn the ball over, which leads to Naji Marshall breaking away for a layup for the Mavericks.

videos.description: Landry Shamet pulls up from the corner and drains a 3-pointer to give the Knicks the lead.

videos.description: Landry Shamet puts the Knicks ahead again with a 3-pointer with just over 30 seconds left in the game.

videos.description: Brandon Williams appears to score the tying basket with 0.7 seconds left, but he is called for an offensive foul as the Knicks hold on for the win.
videos.headline: Mavs' tying bucket negated by foul as Knicks hold on

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mavs' tying bucket negated by foul as Knicks hold on) 2025/11/20 ESHEET
